message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, each corresponding to the questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? It does not list sections. So fails. Feedback: No listing. complies: false.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? There's no description of sections. So fails. Feedback: no description. complies: false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure just from this text? No. So fails. Feedback: not clear. complies: false.

Return array accordingly. Ensure each object has "question" field: should be one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback and boolean. No extra text. Ensure JSON array format.

[

  {

  },
  {
